perks.summary: Shapiro-Wilk normality test on a numeric column (+ Q-Q/histogram figure)
Levene's test for homogeneity of variance across groups (+ box/variance figure)
Linear-fit + residuals-vs-fitted linearity diagnostic for two numeric columns (+ figure)
Detect outliers in a numeric column by IQR or z-score (+ box/scatter figure)
Comprehensive assumption check (outliers + normality + variance homogeneity) for a column, optionally by group
